extDescription.message: MiniWeb is a customizable launcher for your frequent websites: pin and manage your own link set, then open and switch them quickly in an always-on-top mini window.

launcherEmptyDesc.message: Click "Pin current page to MiniWeb" to add this page to the icon bar.

launcherCurrentUrlNotPinable.message: Current page URL cannot be pinned.

launcherCurrentMissing.message: Current icon not found or already deleted.

launcherOpenedExternally.message: This site cannot be embedded and was opened externally.

launcherOpenBlockedByResponse.message: Page open failed: site policy blocks embedded loading (ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE). Use "Open in new tab".

launcherOpenFallback.message: Page open failed: target site refused connection or network is unreachable. Check protocol, port, and service status.

launcherOpenHttpsHint.message: Page open failed: $1 may not have HTTPS enabled. Try HTTP or the correct port.

launcherOpenConnRefusedHost.message: Page open failed: $1 refused connection. Ensure service is running and listening on the correct port (e.g. :80/:8080).

launcherOpenConnRefusedPort.message: Page open failed: $1:$2 refused connection. Check service process, firewall, or LAN routing.

optionsHeaderDesc.message: MiniWeb extension settings page. Manage site-fix rules below to resolve compatibility issues between certain pages and the icon bar.

optionsGuideIntro.message: MiniWeb is a frequent-site launcher opened from the page context menu. Pin pages as icons and switch quickly in a mini window.

optionsGuideEntry.message: Entry: right-click any page, then select "Add current page to MiniWeb" in the menu to pin it as an icon.

optionsGuidePin.message: Pin links: right-click menu to pin the current page, or add a URL directly via "Add link manually" at the bottom of this page.

optionsGuideOpen.message: Click an icon: switches to that link inside the mini window. If the site blocks embedding, an error is shown — use Ctrl+click or right-click as alternatives.

optionsGuideCtrlClick.message: Ctrl (Mac: Cmd) + click icon: opens the link in a new browser tab, bypassing embedding restrictions.

optionsGuideContextPip.message: Right-click an icon: opens the link in an always-on-top mini window (floats above all other windows).

optionsGuideDelete.message: Delete a link: hover over the MiniWeb logo in the top-left of the mini window — a minus button appears. Click it, then hold to confirm deletion (hold-to-delete prevents accidental removal).

optionsGuideShortcut.message: Shortcut: default Ctrl+Shift+M to quickly open or toggle MiniWeb; customize in Chrome Settings → Extensions → Keyboard shortcuts.

optionsGuideTips.message: Site-fix rules: the rule section below fixes issues like icon bar overlapping page content or broken styles on certain sites. Most users do not need to change this.

optionsManualDesc.message: If context menu is blocked on a site, add the link here directly.

optionsManualInvalidUrl.message: Please enter a valid http/https URL

optionsJsonImported.message: Imported from JSON to cards. Remember to click Save all settings.

optionsRuleSelectorsRequired.message: At least one "CSS selector" is required

optionsRuleHint.message: Hostname regex: type hostname directly, e.g. chat.deepseek.com. URL regex: keyword or regex, e.g. zashboard.

optionsRuleObserver.message: Enable MutationObserver re-apply styles for dynamic pages

optionsRuleNoMainframe.message: Direct open mode (no main frame header rewrite)

optionsRulesEmpty.message: No rules yet. Click "Add site rule" to create your first rule.

optionsSaved.message: Saved. Opened target pages will apply new rules within 1 second.

optionsResetConfirm.message: Reset to default rules? Current edits will be lost.

optionsResetDone.message: Defaults restored. Click Save all settings to apply.

pipCurrentUrlNotPinable.message: Current page URL cannot be pinned

sidePipDisabledToast.message: PiP is disabled by rule for this site
